## Change Summary

## Linked Work Items (Required)
- Closes #
- Relates #
- Phase: #
- Spec: `spec/phase/phase-XX.md`

## Change Type
- [ ] type:feature
- [ ] type:bugfix
- [ ] type:refactor
- [ ] type:test
- [ ] type:docs
- [ ] type:gate-fix

## Gate Results (Required)
- [ ] gate-manifest
- [ ] gate-rules
- [ ] gate-compile
- [ ] gate-integration
- [ ] gate-contract
- [ ] gate-nfr

```text
Paste gate summary output here
```

## Checklist
- [ ] PR links Issue(s) with `Closes #` or `Relates #`
- [ ] Changes are within approved Phase scope
- [ ] Docs/spec updated if behavior changed
